pageHeader.title: Internship Program
pageHeader.description: Join the Pilar Labs team and begin your professional career. Gain hands-on experience with real projects, direct mentorship from practitioners, and build a portfolio ready to compete in the industry.

positions.title: Available Positions
positions.subtitle: We are opening opportunities for young talent eager to grow with our team for 3–6 months

frontend.title: Frontend Developer
frontend.description: Build modern, responsive, and engaging user interfaces using React and TypeScript.

backend.title: Backend Developer
backend.description: Develop reliable APIs and scalable server-side applications using Node.js or Python.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Developer
fullstack.description: Handle both frontend and backend development to build complete and production-ready web applications.

uiux.title: UI/UX Designer
uiux.description: Design intuitive, aesthetic, and consistent user interfaces and experiences using Figma.

mobile.title: Mobile Developer
mobile.description: Develop lightweight and performant cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter or React Native.

data.title: Data Analyst / Data Engineer
data.description: Process, analyze, and visualize data to support accurate business decision-making.

devops.title: DevOps / Cloud Engineer
devops.description: Manage cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and ensure ongoing system availability and security.

requirements.title: Requirements
items: Active student (minimum 3rd semester) or fresh graduate from a relevant field
Strong interest and enthusiasm in technology and digital development
Basic understanding of the desired position
Able to commit a minimum of 20 hours per week for 3–6 months
Self-driven, proactive, and highly eager to learn
Portfolio or personal projects (GitHub, Behance, or similar)

benefits.title: What You'll Get
benefits.subtitle: The Pilar Labs internship program is designed to accelerate your learning and professional career growth

mentorship.title: Direct Mentorship
mentorship.description: Intensive guidance from experienced senior developers and designers in the industry.

projects.title: Real Projects
projects.description: Be directly involved in active production projects used by real clients and users.

certificate.title: Official Certificate
certificate.description: Receive a professionally recognized internship completion certificate.

flexible.title: Flexible Schedule
flexible.description: Working hours that can be adjusted to your academic schedule, perfect for active students.

process.title: Application Process
process.subtitle: A transparent, simple, and time-efficient selection process

apply.title: Apply
apply.description: Send your CV and portfolio via our email or WhatsApp.

review.title: Document Review
review.description: Our team will review your application within 1–2 working weeks.

interview.title: Interview
interview.description: A brief technical interview and work culture fit discussion.

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.description: Welcome aboard! Begin your learning journey with the Pilar Labs team.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Career Journey?
cta.description: Submit your application now and become part of the Pilar Labs team as an intern developer.
